zh.lifeSummary: 當George Felt於1610年2月出生在英國貝德福爾麗頓 布札爾德時，他的父親William Felt35歲，母親Mary Smith24歲。他於1635年與Elizabeth Wilkinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1639年住在美國緬因州。他去世於1693年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼馬爾登享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Felt于1610年2月出生在英国貝德福爾麗頓 布札爾德时，他的父亲William Felt35岁，母亲Mary Smith24岁。他于1635年与Elizabeth Wilkinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1639年住在美国缅因州。他去世于1693年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼馬爾登享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Felt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name for someone who made, worked with, sold, or perhaps wore felt, from Middle English felt ‘felt’. Compare Felter .
German: rare variant of Feld ‘field, area of open country’, or an Americanized form of its cognate Velt.
Swedish: rare variant of   Feldt  , a cognate of 2 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Felter
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Felten or Velten.
Americanized form of German Felder or a shortened and altered form of any of various surnames formed with -felder, as for example Kleinfelder (compare Kleinfelter ).

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

Historical Boundaries: 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: Massachusetts, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1760: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When George Felt was born in February 1610, in Leighton Buzzard, Bedfordshire, England, his father, William Felt, was 35 and his mother, Mary Smith, was 24. He married Elizabeth Wilkinson in 1635, in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Maine, United States in 1639. He died in 1693, in Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Felt est né en février 1610, à Leighton Buzzard, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Felt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mary Smith, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wilkinson en 1635, à Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Maine, États-Unis en 1639. Il est décédé en 1693, à Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 83 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Felt è nato il nel febbraio 1610 nel Leighton Buzzard, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Felt, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mary Smith, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wilkinson nel 1635, nel Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: George Feltが1610年2月にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアレイトン ブッザルドで生まれた時，父William Feltは35歳，母Mary Smithは24歳であった。1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーチャーレストウンでElizabeth Wilkinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にはアメリカ合衆国メイン州に住んでいた。彼は1693年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーマルデンで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Felt(이)가 1610년 2월 영국 베드퍼드실르 레이턴 버자르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Felt(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Smith(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 찰레스타운에서 Elizabeth Wilkinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 미국 메인 주에서 살았다. 그는 1693년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 맬든에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Felt nasceu em fevereiro de 1610, em Leighton Buzzard, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Felt, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mary Smith, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wilkinson em 1635, em Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Maine, Estados Unidos da América em 1639. Ele faleceu em 1693, em Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Felt родился февраль 1610 г. в местности лиитон буззард, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Felt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Smith, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wilkinson в 1635 г. в местности чарльстоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности Мэн, Соединенные штаты в 1639 году. Он умер в 1693 г. в местности малден, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Felt nació en febrero de 1610, en Leighton Buzzard, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Felt, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mary Smith, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wilkinson en 1635, en Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Maine, Estados Unidos en 1639. Murió en 1693, en Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 83 años.
